display.purpose: Hero headline (index) and case-study h1.title only.

headline.purpose: Section titles (Works / About / Contact) and case-study step headings.

title.purpose: Feature-card headings and callout stat lines.

body.purpose: All paragraph copy, capped near 620-640px measure.

label.purpose: Section indices, meta rows, tag chips — small, tracked, uppercase-adjacent.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Feature-card hover state on the works grid — the only elevation cue in the system.

shadows.name: thumb-lift
shadows.purpose: Works-grid screenshot mockups, simulating a physical printed screenshot.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default transition for color/background/transform state changes (.15s-.2s).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Link, button, and nav color transitions.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid ink pill CTA; hover swaps to the page's accent color.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 13px 26px; border-radius: 999px; background: #141310; color: #fff; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-decoration: none; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #7c2cd6; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c2cd6; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Outline pill CTA; hover inverts to solid ink.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; min-height: 44px; padding: 13px 26px; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #141310; color: #141310; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.02em; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.15s; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #141310; color: #fff; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #7c2cd6; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Tag Chip
components.description: Pill-shaped metadata tag used on works cards; the .pdf variant borrows the page accent to flag a downloadable proposal.
components.html: UXリサーチPDF付き
components.css: .ds-tag { display: inline-block; border: 1px solid #e0ddd4; border-radius: 999px; padding: 5px 13px; font-size: 11px; color: #3a3833; background: #f5f3ee; } .ds-tag--pdf { border-color: #7c2cd6; color: #7c2cd6; background: transparent; }

components.name: Feature Card
components.description: Signature two-column works-grid card: dark visual panel with a radial accent glow on one side, body copy with role/tags/link on the other.
components.html:
MEDICAL / PATIENT SAFETY

Patient Record
Management System

医療 / 患者安全 UX

診療の集中を壊さずに、緊急報告を確実に届けるシステムへ。

Read case study →
components.css: .ds-feature { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1.05fr .95fr; border: 1px solid #e0ddd4; border-radius: 22px; overflow: hidden; background: #fff; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; } .ds-feature:hover { transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: 0 22px 46px -28px rgba(20,19,16,.3); } .ds-feature__vis { background: #141310; color: #f2efe8; padding: 36px 38px; min-height: 220px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: space-between; gap: 20px; position: relative; overflow: hidden; } .ds-feature__vis::after { content: ''; position: absolute; right: -60px; bottom: -80px; width: 280px; height: 280px; border-radius: 50%; background: radial-gradient(circle at 30% 30%, rgba(124,44,214,.55), transparent 68%); } .ds-feature__lab { font-size: 11px; letter-spacing: 0.16em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #a29c90; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-feature__vis h3 { font-size: clamp(22px,3vw,32px); font-weight: 800; line-height: 1.08; letter-spacing: -0.02em; position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-feature__body { padding: 32px 30px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; } .ds-feature__fk { font-size: 11px; color: #7c2cd6; letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 700; } .ds-feature__body h4 { font-size: 17px; margin: 12px 0; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1.6; } .ds-feature__go { font-size: 13px; color: #7c2cd6; font-weight: 700; }

components.name: Sticky Nav
components.description: Translucent blurred topbar with pill CTA; shared across every page.
components.html:
AIKA YOSHIDA
WorksAboutContact
Get in touch
components.css: .ds-topbar { position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 22px; height: 68px; padding: 0 32px; background: rgba(245,243,238,.9); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-bottom: 1px solid #e0ddd4; } .ds-brand { font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: 0.14em; font-size: 13px; text-decoration: none; color: #141310; } .ds-topbar nav { display: flex; gap: 8px; } .ds-topbar nav a { text-decoration: none; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #3a3833; padding: 12px 10px; min-height: 44px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; transition: color 0.15s; } .ds-topbar nav a:hover { color: #7c2cd6; } .ds-cta { text-decoration: none; font-size: 12.5px; font-weight: 700; color: #fff; background: #141310; padding: 12px 20px; min-height: 44px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 999px; transition: background 0.15s; } .ds-cta:hover { background: #7c2cd6; }

narrative.overview:
Every page reads like a folder pulled from a records office: ink-black type on warm cream paper, a single stamped accent color per case, borders instead of shadows, and numbered rows instead of decorative cards. Nothing performs; the layout gets out of the way of the argument each page is making — that a sales background is a design asset, proven case by case rather than claimed once on a hero.

The system explicitly rejects the generic AI-portfolio grammar: no gradient text, no tiny tracked eyebrows stacked above every section, no glassmorphism, no identical icon-plus-heading card grids, no hero-metric templates. Where the site needs emphasis it uses one accent color and plain, specific language — numbers, roles, timeframes — never adjectives doing the work numbers should do.
keyCharacteristics: Ink (#141310) on cream (#f5f3ee), one accent color per page, everything else neutral.
Flat at rest; shadow appears only as a hover response on clickable cards.
Pill buttons and pill tags are the only rounded-to-circle shapes; content containers use a shared 26/18/12px radius scale, never fully square, never a stripe border.
Bilingual type: Inter carries Latin/UI text, Noto Sans JP carries Japanese prose, in the same weight scale.

rules.name: The Borrowed Palette Rule
rules.body: A case study's accent color comes from its client's world, not the site's default purple. Ink, cream, line, and card neutrals never change; only the accent — and its -deep, -soft, -light steps — swaps per page. Consistency lives in the shared structure, not a shared color.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Exactly one accent color is active on any given page. It never mixes with another page's accent, and it never appears at more than a small fraction of the surface.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Section labels sit as small tracked metadata beside a heading, never as a centered standalone kicker above it. They're a page index, not a decorative device.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest — border and fill only. A shadow appears exclusively as a hover response on something clickable; it is never used to fake depth on static content.

dos: Do keep ink/cream/line/card neutrals identical across every page; only the accent token changes per case study (The Borrowed Palette Rule).
Do use full-pill radius (999px) for every button and tag, and the 26/18/12px descending scale for content containers — never square corners on a card.
Do keep shadows exclusive to hover states on clickable elements (The Flat-By-Default Rule); everything else is border + fill.
Do state real numbers, roles, and timeframes in case-study copy instead of adjectives.
Do keep the radial accent-color glow confined to dark full-bleed panels as the one allowed gradient-adjacent effect.
donts: Don't use border-left/border-right as a colored accent stripe on any card, callout, or list item.
Don't apply background-clip: text gradient text for emphasis.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively; the topbar's backdrop-blur is the one sanctioned, functional use.
Don't stack a tiny tracked all-caps eyebrow above every section.
Don't build identical icon+heading+text card grids.
Don't mix two accent colors on one page, and never reuse another case study's accent instead of the current page's own.
